title: benstonea pumila
intro: Benstonea pumila, also known as the "mini Philodendron", is a species of flowering plant in the family Pandanaceae, native to the tropical rainforests of Australia and New Guinea. The medicinal properties of Benstonea pumila lie in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide antioxidant properties. Benstonea pumila is typically used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, decoctions, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
